name: Operate an agent system change safely
when_to_use: Mid-change: wiring observability, a loop, an autonomy controller, a budget, or a release gate for a running agent system

name: Audit and score an agent operations posture
when_to_use: Audit a running agent system's observability, optimization loop, autonomy controls, reliability/cost, or maturity, then score it

name: Shape an agent operations loop, assess maturity, or explain
when_to_use: Design observability, a trace-and-eval loop, an autonomy controller, reliability/release gates; assess maturity and route the work to the right sibling; or explain a principle
